title: AnimatedSilverTotem
description: A simple silver animated totem with blinking eyes that adds a bit of personality and life to your Minecraft world.
body:
# Animated Silver Totem

Bring your Minecraft world to life with this **silver animated totem** featuring smooth, natural blinking eyes.  
Its subtle eye movements add **personality** and **charm** without being distracting.

---

### Heavily Inspired By  
**Rebonok** and **GordonFreeman**.

---

*Add a little life. Add a little magic.*
